name: Envoy
description: Envoy is a Gmail-first support inbox and agent-assist workspace built as a pnpm monorepo.

scripts.db:start: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter @envoy/db exec prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter web exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter worker typecheck
